Hi, I'm Kishore V, a BSc Computer Science student at RD National College, Erode. I am deeply passionate about technology, artificial intelligence, and Android app development.

I enjoy learning new skills, exploring innovative ideas, and building projects that can make everyday life easier. Currently, I am focused on improving my programming skills, learning Android development, and understanding modern technologies that shape the future.

My goal is to continuously learn, build useful products, and grow into a professional developer capable of creating impactful solutions.
